Engage: Give a target Follower or Personality +2F or -2F.
Battle, :bow:: Ranged 3 Attack.
title: Junghar Regulars

flavor: They have foresworn their lord's name until his spirit is returned to the Realm of Evil.
designernotes: Shambling hordes of ancient undead samurai rise up in the Shadowlands as worried Crab troops look on.

text:
After this Follower enters play, lose 2 Honor.
Interrupt: If the action is from an Undead card, its Fear effects may target Items and Spells, and destroy attachments after they bow them.
title: Legion of the Ninth Kami

flavor: The warcats of the Lion possess a hierarchy, just as do the samurai they serve.
designernotes: Art: A Lion feasting on the results of its hunt, having taken down a deer or other appropriate animal. Other members of its pride wait for their turn, deferring to the larger beast.

text:
Compassion: This Follower's printed ability has no bow cost. (Compassion takes effect while you have fewer Provinces than anyone else.)
Battle, :bow:: Melee 3 Attack.
title: Razorfang

flavor: "Should we retreat?" the Shiba asked. His commander shook his head. "There would be no point at all."
designernotes: A troop of battle maiden charging.

text: Battle: Give a target enemy defending Personality -3F. Gain 1 Honor if his Force is now 0.
title: Shiotome Patrol

flavor: On the battlefield, the sound of thunder under a clear sky is the sound of impending death.
designernotes: A unit of fearsome-looking Moto chargers.

text: Battle: Fear 3 that, if this unit is Cavalry, destroys Infantry cards after it bows them (Bow a target enemy Follower or Personality without Followers with 3 or lower Force).
title: The Thundering Death

flavor: "You are not one of us! You are not one of the samurai! Begone from our home or die!"

text: Battle: Straighten your target Ashigaru.
title: Village Defenders

flavor: Fools occasionally mistook them for Spider monks. It was a mistake no one ever repeated, for the monks were very... educationally minded.
designernotes: These are the Order of the Spider Monks with Tetsuo.

text: Battle: Give one or two target enemy Personalities, each with a different Clan Alignment, -2F each.
title: Brotherhood Sohei

flavor: "The majesty of bushido is that it can manifest itself even in the least of souls. Courage can rise from humbleness and honor any lord with its service." - Akodo's Leadership
designernotes: Ashigarus armed with spears defending scared peasants.

text: After this Follower enters play from your hand, draw an additional card before your turn ends.
title: Courageous Ashigaru

flavor: "Fire immediately behind the front line as soon as the charge begins!"
designernotes: Art: A Scorpion Samurai surrounded by his own archery unit, sights set on opposing troops. They are perfectly aligned around him, leaving no chance for any enemies to approach.

text:
Interrupt: Negate the action's challenges to this Personality if the challenger has no Followers.
Battle, :bow:: Ranged 3 Attack.
title: Defensive Archers

flavor: "Wait a moment, my lady. Something here seems amiss."
designernotes: [Art Note: This is a very honorable guard guarding an incredibly important Imperial. Perhaps Seiken or Shibatsu himself.]

text:
Reduce the Gold cost to Equip this Follower by the Personality's Personal Honor.
Interrupt: Negate this Personality's movement from the action.
title: Emerald Guard

flavor: "His name is Rage. Fear him as you fear death."
designernotes: Notes: Continuing the family of Cats from 20 Festivals that is developing. As the male, this is the biggest and scariest one.

text:
This Follower has +1F for each bowed Follower and bowed Personality opposing it.
After you discard this Follower from your hand for a Courage Interrupt, you may take an additional action to Equip it (after the original action resolves).
title: Legendary Warcat

flavor: "No one need know anything about this," she whispered with a smile. "It is best to leave such secrets to the Scorpion."
designernotes: [Art Note: Scorpion Ninja, dressed as Mantis, attacking the Kitsu Tombs]

text:
After this Follower enters play, lose 2 Honor.
Ninja Open: Look at a face-down card in another player's Province.
title: Master Infiltrator

flavor: The Spider forces advanced upon the temple, skeletal nightmares riding at the front of their battle lines.
designernotes: Some sort of Cavalry Oni.

text:
After this Follower enters play, lose 4 Honor.
Battle: Fear 2 that destroys Followers after it bows them.
title: Oni Familiar

flavor: "I purchased his loyalty, yes, but I worry I may not have paid enough."
designernotes: An unscrupulous mercenary who doubles as an assassin.

text:
After this Follower enters play, lose 1 Honor.
Ninja Battle, :g2:: Ranged 3 Attack (Destroy a target enemy Follower or Personality without Followers with 3 or lower Force).
title: Questionable Vassal

flavor: Few military forces are as respected.
designernotes: Beautifil looking Battle maidens escort

text:
After this Follower enters play, gain 1 Honor. This Personality has +1PH. After this unit moves to oppose a defender, gain 1 Honor.
Battle, :bow:: Fear equal to this Personality's Personal Honor.
title: Shiotome Troupe

flavor: "To the Sea of Shadows!" Akukiho ordered. His men reacted no differently than when ordered to pursue human quarry.
designernotes: Sons of Gusai mercenaries on a kobune in the ominous Sea of Shadows, with the Mantis Fleet.

text:
(Repeatable Interrupt: Discard a Courage card to give a Fear effect +2 or -2 strength.)
Battle, :g2:: Give another target opposed Mercenary +2F.
title: Sons of Gusai

flavor: "The scouts said nothing about this!" the Scorpion hissed as the ancient ancestors of the Lion shimmered into existence, barring their path.
designernotes: Art: A group of Kitsu guardian spirits protecting Shiro Ikoma from some Scorpion invaders. They have raised the alarm and alerted the living protectors that there are intruders.

text:
(Repeatable Interrupt: Discard an Honor card to give an Honor gain or loss +1 or -1.)
Absent Home Battle: Move this Personality to the current battlefield if any enemy attacking units are there. Straighten the Personality as he or she moves.
title: Spiritual Sentries

flavor: The oni's roar was matched with the pure, powerful growl of earth and fire, forged together to stop it.
designernotes:
Note: This is Tamori Daiishu's Spirit from here - http://imperialassembly.com/oracle/#cardid=11899

Should be featured on Daiishu's art in this set too

text:
After this Personality straightens, straighten this Follower.
Earth Battle, :bow:: Fear equal to twice this Follower's Force.
title: The Mountainborn

flavor: "They seem cute and playful… until one of them "playfully" removes a man's finger."
designernotes: Two young lion cubs playing at fighting.

text:
Negate Fear effects targeting this Follower while it is opposing a bowed Follower or Personality.
Battle: Fear 2 or give a target enemy Follower or Personality -2F.
